name: Choucroute Garnie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover bacon strips with boiling water; set aside.
2. Cut pork into 1-inch chunks.
3. Slice knackwurst and Italian sausages in half.
4. Combine pork, knackwurst, and sausages and set aside.
5. Drain sauerkraut, rinse in cold water, and squeeze dry.
6. Drain bacon and pat dry.
7. Chop bacon and mix into sauerkraut.
8. Add crushed juniper berries and gin to the mixture.
9. Add half of the sauerkraut mixture to the crockpot.
10. Add mixed meats and remaining sauerkraut, sprinkling with pepper as you go.
11. Pour wine over all and cover.
12. Cook about 2 hours on High.
13. Turn into warmed serving bowl.
14. Sprinkle with parsley.
15. Serve with boiled potatoes. Pass around mustard or horseradish, if desired.
